title: create_DESkey
text: create_DESkey Turn a string of 7 bytes into a DES key by adding an odd-parity bit for every 7 bits. The result is 8 bytes long; in each byte, the bit with the lowest significance is the parity bit. extern void create_DESkey (unsigned char *String , unsigned char *DESkey ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description String IN 7 byte string to be turned into DE key. DESkey OUT 8 byte DES key that can be used to encode and decode data using the DESencrypt and DESdecrypt functions. Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data. Related Links DESdecrypt Decode 8 bytes of data in DES format DESencrypt Encode 8 bytes of data in DES format Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
